title: Is There a Way to Merge Duplicate Pulses?
excerpt: Is there a way to merge duplicate pulses within a board?

posts.author: WildRiver (Susan Arakawa)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to merge duplicate pulses within a board?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @WildRiver, at the moment there’s not! However, I think that’s a great idea and would recommend submitting this as a feature request! If you’d like help for your specific use case you can also write to su at support@monday.com

posts.author: WildRiver (Susan Arakawa)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, Talia. I will do what you suggested.
